title: Strawberry
description: Vanilla with a bit of extra flavor
body:
# About

Strawberry is a modpack designed to be vanilla with a bit of extra "flavor", without any requirement for a compatible server running the pack. 

Strawberry brings features like 3D Skin Layers, and different models for objects like doors, trapdoors and bookshelves, adding subtle depth.

![Comparison between vanilla graphics and strawberry graphics](https://github.com/artificialbutter/StrawberryModpack/blob/main/vanillagraphicscompare.gif?raw=true)

Strawberry focuses on subtle experience improvements, like audio improvements for ambient sounds as you explore like the sound of the wind out in the snow, or hearing the difference in material under your feet down to the splashing while out in the rain. The modpack also adds complementary reimagined shaders by default, improving the overall graphics while not taking away from the original game (or your performance).

This pack also adds QoL features to your client, including
- Lower FPS when the game is in the background, improving performance for the rest of your computer.
- No chat reports
- Better F3 Menu
- More chat history
- Dark GUI (and loading screen) with smoother font, keeping your eyes happy :D

# Includes 

- Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
- [Full List](https://github.com/artificialbutter/StrawberryModpack/blob/main/MODLIST.txt)


# Changelog

### V2.0.0
- Updated to Minecraft 1.20.2
- Changed from Fabric to Quilt
- Slimmed down mod list
